message:
test(db): scope policy + redaction property tests (br-3vwi.10.17)

65 tests across 17 categories covering permission scope evaluation and
redaction transforms: structural invariants (monotonicity, operator
supremacy, count conservation), policy cascade (all 4 ContactPolicyKind
variants), redaction irreversibility (all 8 field combinations, unicode,
empty body), audit completeness, adversarial fixtures (unicode names,
extreme IDs, alias collisions, missing metadata, self-referential
viewers, empty contexts), cross-project isolation, recipient scoping,
batch processing, SQL clause generation, serde roundtrips, evaluation
priority ordering, deterministic audit trace format, and 10k-result
stress test.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
